titleStmt.title: SII 15.243: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 243. (B.K. No. 222 of 1926-27.) ABBĪGĒRI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken stone lying below a tamarind tree at Chaukimaṭha.
This damaged record contains the following details of the date: Mārgaśira śu. 7, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. It cannot be verified.

It records two land gifts. The second is a gift of land to the god Mūlasthāna after washing the feet of the preceptor Mallikārjuna by the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvaras Vīra-Bijjaṇa and Vikramāditya of the Sinda family who were rulingfrom their capital at Erambarage. The earlier portion which is damaged contains references to Chāmuṇḍarasa, Kisukāḍu, Abbayigeṟe and a gift the details being lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The top portion of the record contains some lines of
div.p:
maṇḍaḷika
ṇa Agaṇya
naṁkakāṟaṁ parabaḷa soṟekā cā
muṁḍara�ru ki�ḍa
damaged
bbayigeṟeya
ra khaṇḍasphu
[¨rppa] tapōdhanara pū¨rvadiṁ naḍeyuttaṁ
baṁdudaṁ © svasti śrī saṁvatsarada mā[¨rgga]
sira sudda 7 brahaspativāramuttarā vyatīpāta kūḍida puṇya
tithiyoḷu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara gāvuṇḍana haṁnasu
Aṟuvatūkala saṁnidhānadoḷ śrīmula svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyā
nadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhāṇa japasamādhiśrīlaguṇasaṁpaṁnarappa śrīma
tu maḷeya paṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ ka¨rci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa
ta dāriyiṁ baḍaga gōvageṟeyiṁ mūḍa hebbaḷḷadiṁ paḍuvalu
ṟuvaṇada mattaraṁ hadināṟu . mattaṁ nū¨rvvaru nakharaṁgaḷa
sōṭige hānagomana Aṁgaḍigomana . matta saramanittu
gā bijjamahībhuja śrīcāmu priyadiṁ puṭṭida rāmalakṣmaṇaravōl
śrī bijjabhūpāḷanuṁ bhaya vikramanītaṁ vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ . hāra
nijarājadhāniyappa Eraṁbaragayoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire
mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara vīrabijjaṇadēvarasaruṁ vikramādityadēvanuṁviddu gāvuṁḍa
saṁnidhānadoḷu śrīmulasthānadēva¨rgge svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāya dhyāna dhāraṇa mōnā
nuṣṭhāṇa japasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmatu mallikā¨rjjunagurugaḷa kālaṁ ka¨rcci
dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa keyi sāyira baniya dāriyiṁ baḍagalu sa[¨rvva]namasyada ma
ttaru haṁneraḍu . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā śaṣṭivariṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 15.243 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
